eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Georgia; at 10:45 PM on JUN 9, 2026 Effective until 11:45 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: FROM THE GEORGIA EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT AGENCY AND THE GEORGIA OFFICE OF HOMELAND SECURITY THIS IS THE REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM.
